figures.caption: Table 4. The ablation results of the Listening-before-Seg mentation module.

Fig. 1. Overview of PCAS: The audio encoder processes audio frame-wise with visual prompts from the visual encoder. CMC aligns global semantics; CMPC and CMCC refine finegrained alignment via cross-modal similarity. The decoder then outputs masks using CAM-based pseudo-labels.

Fig. 2. CMPC loss computation. ViT, AST*, 𝑃𝑎, 𝑃𝑝 denote the visual encoder, audio encoder with visual prompt, and projection layers for audio semantic tokens and visual patch tokens. Patches, AUX Patches, Patch Labels are ViT patch outputs, intermediate auxiliary patches, and positive/negative token-wise contrast labels.
